# KB Drift Queue

KB spec changed — developer reviews with Claude whether code still matches.

> **Before opening a PR:** confirm entries for specs you changed.
> Run `kb_drift` with `kb_confirmed` for each entry once code matches.

> **On merge conflicts:** queue files use `merge=union` — different entries from different branches coalesce automatically. If the same entry appears twice, dedupe by merging the two: keep the earlier `Since` commit (the true drift anchor) and the later `Latest` commit (the most recent touch). The post-merge git hook collapses duplicate `<!-- baseline: -->` lines automatically; if it didn't run, keep whichever SHA is the descendant of the other.
